prerequisites: An active Freshsales (Freshworks CRM) account on a plan that includes API access. The Sprout/free plan does not provide API access.
Your Freshsales domain (domain_name), the account host such as yourcompany.myfreshworks.com or yourcompany.freshworks.com.
Your Freshsales API key, available from your user profile's API Settings.

authMethods.name: API key (token)
authMethods.summary: Freshsales authenticates each request with a per-user API key sent in the Authorization: Token token=YOUR_API_KEY header. This maps to the connector's api_key secret field. Each user has a unique key, which can be reset from API Settings to revoke access.

setupSteps.title: Confirm your plan includes API access
setupSteps.body: Make sure your Freshsales subscription supports API access. The Sprout plan does not include API access.

setupSteps.title: Find your domain name
setupSteps.body: Identify the host of your Freshsales account, for example yourcompany.myfreshworks.com or yourcompany.freshworks.com. Enter this value in the domain_name config field.

setupSteps.title: Copy your API key
setupSteps.body: In Freshsales, click your profile picture and open Settings (Profile Settings), then click the API Settings tab. Copy the value shown under 'Your API key'. Use 'Reset Key' if you need to revoke a previously issued key.

setupSteps.title: Enter credentials in the connector
setupSteps.body: Provide the copied API key in the api_key field and your account host in the domain_name field. The connector sends the key as Authorization: Token token=YOUR_API_KEY on each request.

sources.title: Freshsales / Freshworks CRM API reference and authentication
How to find my API key? - Freshsales Support
